scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run build --prefix client && npx cap copy ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run build --prefix client && npx cap copy android && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build --prefix client && npx cap sync
